extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each entity: I counted only the Against rows, giving criminal counts of 1 against the Company, 6 against Directors, 0 against Subsidiaries, 7 against Promoters, and 0 against KMPs and Senior Management; the By rows were excluded. Regulatory actions against the group were 1 against the Company and nil for the other listed entities, while tax proceedings against the Company and Subsidiaries were 23 and nil, respectively; promoter tax matters were excluded from the tax count. The quantified aggregate amount against the Company was ₹1,748.88 million, with nil against Subsidiaries, totaling ₹1,748.88 million, or ₹174.888 crore; promoter and director amounts and all By amounts were excluded. No contingent-liabilities total is stated in the provided risk section, only references to other sections. The customer concentration disclosed is company-wide Net Membership Fees, not revenue from operations: top 10 clients contributed 24.01% in Fiscal 2025, while no top-five percentage is provided; the litigation source unit is ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
